calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 204. Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petitioner: Virginia Poincelot was present with Counsel Hong Chew.

Respondent: Amina Goins was present.

Virginia Poincelot and Amina Goins were sworn.

The Parties stipulated to a one year restraining order and to Ms. Goins retrieving her belongings with a third person within 30-days. Ms. Poincelot and Ms. Goins stated that they agree and understand the terms of the stipulation. The Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Virginia Poincelot, her Residence, her vehicle and the Bayview Hunters Point Adult Center located at 1250 La Salle St. San Francisco, CA.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to
Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

Respondent must move out immediately from and not return to: 3161 Kamille Court, San Francisco, CA, 94110.

No Guns or Other Firearms/Turn In or Sell Guns or Firearms.

Expires: April 25, 2012.

Order signed.
